name: Workspace Truth Guard for OpenClaw
description: Keep docs, memory, and repo truth aligned in long-running OpenClaw work. Diagnose canon drift first, then preview and apply bounded fixes for supported memory and sync issues.

stateFilePath.description: Optional path to the canon state JSON file. Defaults to .openclaw-canon-state.json under the detected canon repo root.

memoryFilePath.description: Optional path to the memory snapshot JSONL file. Defaults to memory.jsonl under the detected canon repo root.

packageCanonPath.description: Optional path to docs/PLUGIN_PACKAGE_CANON.md under the detected canon repo root.

publishPreflightPath.description: Optional path to docs/CLAWHUB_PUBLISH_PREFLIGHT.md under the detected canon repo root.

repoReadmePath.description: Optional path to the repo README.md used for sync checks under the detected canon repo root.

ciWorkflowPath.description: Optional path to the CI workflow that enumerates plugin packages under the detected canon repo root.
